title: Data Structures
description: Choosing between list, dict, tuple, and set — and the list-of-dicts pattern for real data.
learning_objectives: Choose the right data structure for a given task
Use the list-of-dicts pattern to represent tabular data
Apply list comprehensions and dict operations to process data
